caption: Two men sit in a room in front of a television. The man on the left wears a green t-shirt, and the man on the right wears a grey t-shirt. Behind them is a shelf filled with CDs and DVDs, and a string of decorative ornaments hangs to the left. At the top of the screen, the yellow text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS" is visible. In the first frame, a black screen displays the text "BASED ON ALEX RUTHERFORD'S" and "Empire of the Mohgul RAIDERS from the North." As the video progresses, the screen shifts to a brightly lit, ornate palace interior with gold pillars. The men maintain neutral expressions, with the man on the right resting his chin on his hand. In the final frames, the scene transitions to a darker room showing characters in traditional attire, with the text "Power doesn't lie with the king who takes the throne." appearing briefly.
